title: stylogyne latipes
intro: Stylogyne latipes, also known as the Thai star anise or Chinese star anise, is a type of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stylogyne latipes include its ability to relieve respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to note that excessive consumption can cause adverse effects.
